'''laluju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uwatenage|uwatenage]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uwatenage|uwatenage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| laluju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lælijith|lælijith]] || [[word:lælijij|lælijij]] || [[word:lælijish|lælijish]] || [[word:læliji|læliji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lalulujuth|lalulujuth]] || [[word:lalulujuj|lalulujuj]] || [[word:lalulujush|lalulujush]] || [[word:laluluju|laluluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lalujuth|lalujuth]] || [[word:lalujuj|lalujuj]] || [[word:lalujush|lalujush]] || [[word:laluju|laluju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalufjuth|lalufjuth]] || [[word:lalufjuj|lalufjuj]] || [[word:lalufjush|lalufjush]] || [[word:lalufjuf|lalufjuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lalujuthu|lalujuthu]] || [[word:lalujuju|lalujuju]] || [[word:lalujushu|lalujushu]] || [[word:lalujuku|lalujuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lalujuth|lalujuth]] || [[word:lalujuj|lalujuj]] || [[word:lalujush|lalujush]] || [[word:laluju|laluju]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lalujuthul|lalujuthul]] || [[word:lalujujul|lalujujul]] || [[word:lalujushul|lalujushul]] || [[word:lalujukul|lalujukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lalujuthuthu|lalujuthuthu]] || [[word:lalujujuju|lalujujuju]] || [[word:lalujushushu|lalujushushu]] || [[word:lalujuku|lalujuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lalujuthun|lalujuthun]] || [[word:lalujujun|lalujujun]] || [[word:lalujushun|lalujushun]] || [[word:lalujukun|lalujukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lalujuthuoro|lalujuthuoro]] || [[word:lalujujuoro|lalujujuoro]] || [[word:lalujushuoro|lalujushuoro]] || [[word:lalujukuoro|lalujukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
